case_title: BORGFELDT COMPANY, INCORPORATED VS. SHAVJI KUMAR JAYRAM DBA GOLDEN GATE PARKING et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORGFELDT COMPANY, INCORPORATED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORGFELDT COMPANY, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAVJI KUMAR JAYRAM DBA GOLDEN GATE PARKING GHANSHAM S. JAIRAM DBA SUNSHINE PARKING DBA GOLDEN GATE PARKING/FRIENDLY PARKING DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXHIBIT LIST FOR PLAINTIFF FILED

MOTIONS IN LIMINE FOR: AN ORDER STRIKING DEFENDANT'S ANSWER AND ENTERING A DEFAULT; AN ORDER PROHIBITING DEFENDANT FROM INTRODUCING EVIDENCE; AN ORDER DEEMING MATTERS TO BE ADMITTED; AND AN ORDER DEEMING ISSUES TO BE IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORGFELDT COMPANY, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAVJI KUMAR JAYRAM DBA GOLDEN GATE PARKING THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 469 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $108,000.00 RENT, $685.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $108,685.00, IN ADDITION: $18,900 HOLDOVER DAMAGES; TOTAL JUDGMENT $127,585 - JUDGMENT IS ALSO AGAINST ANY AND ALL SUBLESSEES, AND OCCUPANTS AT THE PREMISES - SEE SCANNED DOC FOR DETAILS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAVJI KUMAR JAYRAM DBA GOLDEN GATE PARKING
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORGFELDT COMPANY, INCORPORATED SERVED JUN-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAVJI KUMAR JAYRAM DBA GOLDEN GATE PARKING
